name: Morphine Sulfate
description: xanuunka Opioid. Waxay bixisaa xanuun baabi'in waxtar leh laakiin waxay sababtaa vasodilation iyo hypotension - si taxadar leh u isticmaal shoogga dhiigbaxa. Ketamine ayaa lagu door bidaa goobaha dagaalka. Isticmaal morphine kaliya bukaanada hemodynamically deggan.
indications: Xanuun dhexdhexaad-ilaa-daran oo ku dhaca bukaannada hemodynamically xasilloon
Ma aha safka kowaad ee TCCC -- door bida ketamine
dose: 2-4 mg IV/IO q4h PRN. Titrate inuu dhaqan galo IM: 5-10 mg q4h PRN.
contraindications: Dhaawac madaxa ah oo bedelay LOC (qaraabo)
warnings: Waxay sababtaa vasodilation -- waxay ka sii dari kartaa shoogga dhiigbaxa. Qiimee BP ka hor iyo ka dib.
Niyad jabka neefsiga -- la soco heerka.

pediatric.dose: 0.05-0.1 mg/kg IV q2-4h PRN. Qiyaasta kaliya ee ugu badan ee 2mg IV ee ilmaha-naive- opioid.
pediatric.note: Si dhow ula soco heerka neefsiga. Dhallaanka dhasha ayaa ah kuwo aad xasaasi u ah.

obstetric.note: Ka gudubta mandheerta. Niyad-jabka neef-mareenka ee dhallaanka waa suurtagal haddii lagu siiyo 2-4 saacadood gudahood dhalmada. U diyaari naloxone ilmaha dhasha.

source: JTS CPG: Acute Pain Management / PHTLS
